profile.workflow_profession_prompt: Let us add your profession. Which specialization should I save in your profile?
profile.workflow_ready_prompt: Let us confirm your availability. From what date can you start work?
profile.workflow_documents_prompt: Good, let us review your documents. Which documents do you already have ready?

smart.profile_score_hint: Complete your data to increase profile trust.
smart.profile_score_strong: Your profile looks trustworthy and ready for matching.
smart.empty_offers: Atlas is still looking for the best offers for you.
smart.empty_documents: Add documents to increase profile trust.
smart.privacy_note: Your data is used only to match offers and contact the coordinator.
smart.workflow_phone_prompt: Please provide your phone number so the coordinator can contact you quickly.
smart.workflow_offers_prompt: I am checking matched offers. Which direction or country interests you most?
intent.employer.ask_quantity: Understood. You are looking for {profession}. I will help prepare the request and check how competitive it is. How many people do you need?
intent.employer.ask_salary: Good, I have saved the role. What salary or hourly rate do you offer for {profession}?
intent.employer.ask_housing: I can prepare this vacancy for recruitment. Do you provide housing for workers?
intent.employer.summary: Understood. I created a draft vacancy and started matching. Vacancy quality: {score}/100.
intent.legalization.reply: Understood. I will help assess the legalization path. Which country and document type are involved?
intent.business.reply: Understood. I will help structure the business request. In which country do you want to operate?
intent.candidate.ask_profession: Understood. I will help you find the right work. What profession or role are you looking for?
intent.candidate.ask_country: Good. I saved the profession. Which country are you in now, and where do you want to work?
intent.candidate.ask_documents: Great. To assess your readiness, please tell me which documents you already have.
intent.candidate.summary: Understood. I updated your profile and started matching offers.
intent.consultation.reply: Understood. Describe the situation, and I will suggest the next step.

chat.opening.candidate: Tell us what work you are looking for and what you can do.
chat.opening.employer: Describe who you are looking for, what skills are needed and where the job is.
chat.opening.general: Briefly tell us how we can help.

dashboard.empty.employer: Your employer request will appear here.
app.tagline: Work, skills and trusted services across Europe.
app.title: ATLAS by EWU
login.subtitle: Secure access for the ATLAS operations team.
form.title: Title
brand.caption: Connecting talent. Building futures.
landing.hero_subtitle: ATLAS works in your interest, remembers your professional history, and builds your Professional DNA.
landing.map_subtitle: ATLAS shows countries of presence and loads real metrics from the backend. Until data appears, the interface stays neutral.
landing.map_live_note: The metrics below are loaded from ATLAS backend.
landing.map_neutral_note: Metrics are not synchronized yet. Countries are shown without invented statistics.
landing.map_unavailable: Map data is temporarily unavailable. Statistics are hidden.
landing.how_subtitle: A short path from first contact to work: no extra screens, with AI verification and a human coordinator where it matters.
landing.step_photo_text: The candidate creates a live profile and adds basic data.
landing.step_docs_text: ATLAS structures documents and highlights gaps.
landing.step_ai_text: The system analyzes experience, risks, country and fit for vacancies.
landing.step_work_text: The candidate receives the next step and coordinator contact.
landing.trust_subtitle: The platform combines automation, document checks and human coordinator responsibility.
landing.trust_ai_text: Profiles are evaluated through structured signals, not guesses.
landing.trust_docs_text: Documents are checked for completeness and risks.
landing.trust_human_text: A coordinator joins when a human decision is needed.
landing.trust_storage_text: Data is stored for matching, verification and contact.
landing.trust_matching_text: ATLAS compares profiles with vacancies and employer requirements.
landing.ai_title: AI that speaks like a person
landing.ai_subtitle: With workers, ATLAS speaks like a teammate: calm and clear. With employers, it sounds like a business partner: structured, concise and practical.
landing.cap_profile_text: Turns a conversation into a CV map and work profile.
landing.cap_docs_text: Sees which documents are missing for a country and vacancy.
landing.cap_matching_text: Matches relevant vacancies without invented statistics.
landing.cap_handoff_text: Transfers context to the coordinator without losing details.
landing.for_you_text: Builds a professional profile and guides the candidate to the next step.
landing.ai_coordinator_subtitle: Analyzes profile, documents and opportunities in real time.
landing.support_subtitle: ATLAS helps close the practical questions that decide whether a person can really start work: legalization, training, housing and insurance.
landing.support_legal_text: The coordinator records the country, document status and sends complex cases to human review.
landing.support_legal_item_3: No final legal decisions from AI
landing.support_courses_text: ATLAS sees profile gaps and can recommend training or certification before matching.
landing.support_housing_text: The platform marks housing needs and shows employers whether accommodation terms are required for the candidate.
landing.support_insurance_text: ATLAS can record insurance support needs and pass them to the coordinator before travel or start.

main.country.loading: Country data is loaded from the ATLAS API.
main.country.choose_lead: Select a gold or silver marker on the globe to view local ATLAS opportunities.

main.role_page.employer.subtitle: Workspace for vacancies, AI candidate matching, recruitment funnel, documents, analytics and CRM.
main.role_page.corporate.subtitle: Enterprise ATLAS for HRM, CRM, AI audit, workforce forecasting, automation, integrations and security.
